query:
SELECT
                            route_path,
                            workspace_id,
                            http_method::TEXT AS "http_method!"
                        FROM
                            http_trigger
                        WHERE
                            workspaced_route IS FALSE
                            AND route_path_key IN (
                                SELECT
                                    route_path_key
                                FROM
                                    http_trigger
                                WHERE
                                    workspaced_route IS FALSE
                                GROUP BY
                                    route_path_key, http_method
                                HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
                            )
                        ORDER BY route_path_key
